reason: Add ./desktop export entry for DesktopPlugin support
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/plugin/package.json b/packages/plugin/package.json
index 3b3a8973d..9fcec0947 100644
--- a/packages/plugin/package.json
+++ b/packages/plugin/package.json
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
   },
   "exports": {
     ".": "./src/index.ts",
+    "./desktop": "./src/desktop.ts",
     "./tool": "./src/tool.ts",
     "./tui": "./src/tui.ts"
   },
